description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a combination of materials, including a woven textile side panel, smooth leather or synthetic overlays, and a rubber sole. The shoe is predominantly dark gray with a herringbone-patterned fabric on the side, black laces, and a visible zipper on the inner side for easy access. The toe cap and heel area show signs of wear, with scuff marks and some discoloration, indicating regular use. The back of the shoe has a distinctive vertical orange stripe running down the heel, adding a pop of color to the otherwise muted palette. The tongue displays a yellow patch with the letters 'GGDB', suggesting a designer or branded origin. The overall silhouette is urban and casual, suitable for streetwear or everyday use.
description: A worn high-top sneaker with dark gray leather, herringbone fabric side panel, black laces, zipper, and an orange heel stripe. Features a yellow 'GGDB' label on the tongue and visible signs of use.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the herringbone-patterned fabric panel, black laces, and scuffed toe cap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black laces, yellow 'GGDB' tongue label, and worn toe area.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the zipper, herringbone fabric, and more of the smooth leather surface.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring the vertical orange stripe on the heel and the padded collar.
attribute_logo: Yellow rectangular patch with 'GGDB' in black letters on the tongue
